name: Felix Cat Pouch 85g Tuna
shortDescription: FELIX Cat Pouch 85g – Tuna . Packed with tender tuna pieces in a rich, mouth-watering jelly , this wet food provides complete and balanced nutrition for adult cats. Enriched with essential vitamins, minerals, and Omega 6 fatty acids , it supports a shiny coat, strong muscles, and everyday vitality. FELIX makes mealtime both wholesome and irresistibly tasty for your cat.
description: Perfect as an everyday meal or as a complementary snack, Felix as Good As It Looks turns mealtimes into a delightful feast your cat will eagerly look forward to. Why Your Cat Will Love It: • Made with tender pieces of tuna in a rich, tasty jelly. • 100% complete and balanced for daily feeding. • Packed with essential vitamins and minerals to support overall health. • Omega-6 fatty acids for a shiny, healthy coat. Irresistible aroma and texture - even picky eaters will enjoy
